title: Area of right triangles
description: Find the area of right triangles
topic_path: Formula for area of a triangle

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the area of the triangle?**



[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ input-number 1]] units$^2$
hints:
The triangle has $\dfrac{1}{2}$ the area of the following rectangle.

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/71aa9610af15c2a7c711b77c2904860b12d2d6de)

$\text{Area of rectangle} = \text{base} \times \text{height}$

$\text{Area of triangle} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height}$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times (7\times 4)$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times 28$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = 14$
The triangle has an area of $14$ units$^2$.

options.alt: A right triangle. The base is 7 units. The height is 4 units. The longest side is 8 units.

assessment_items.question_content:

hints:

$\text{Area of triangle} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height}$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times (3\times 6)$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times 18$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = 9$
The triangle has an area of $9$ units$^2$.

options.alt: A right triangle. The base is 3 units. The height is 6 units. The longest side is 6.7 units.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the area of the triangle?**


[[☃ image 1]]

[[☃ input-number 1]] units$^2$
hints:
The triangle has $\dfrac{1}{2}$ the area of the following rectangle.

[[☃ image 1]]

$\text{Area of rectangle} = \text{base} \times \text{height}$

$\text{Area of triangle} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times \text{base} \times \text{height}$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = \dfrac{1}{2} \times (8\times 15)$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = (\dfrac{1}{2} \times 8)\times 15$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = 4 \times 15$

$\phantom{\text{Area of triangle}} = 60$
The triangle has an area of $60$ units$^2$.

options.alt: A right triangle. The base is 8 units. The height is 15 units. The longest side is 17 units.
